programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be a Car Salesman
programme.desc: An ex-con rebuilds his reputation as a successful car salesman until a freak accident threatens to send him back to jail.

programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Snowball Effect
programme.desc: At Jackie's slippery build site, the team works to finish the subfloor and start raising walls, but rain and mud hinder them at every step. Meanwhile, the Hills are forced to dig their supplies out of three feet of snow.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Is a Good Thing
programme.desc: The Hills race to finish installing their floor to avoid a delivery delay, which leads to an on-site injury. Meanwhile, Jackie and her team run into problems when their build materials start to fall apart.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Is the Sketchy Part
programme.desc: The Hills work on their first floor framing, but work slows to a stop when their tools begin to freeze. The Owens work on installing the second story gables, while Jackie and her team work to finish the cabin's roof structure.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Monster Cupcakes
programme.desc: It's monster truck madness as four bakers battle for a place at the VIP Pre-Race Pit Party for Monster Truck Jam.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cosmic Cupcakes
programme.desc: Expect out of this world creations when four bakers compete for the chance to launch their cupcakes into the stratosphere at a black tie gala celebrating the arrival of Space Shuttle Endeavour in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Four talented bakers compete to have their cupcakes featured at the opening night party for the New York City Ballet's performance of 'The Nutcracker.'

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Ginger and Spice and Everything Nice
programme.desc: In this week's challenges, the six remaining bakers revel in the warm, taste bud-tingling flavour of ginger. They must make mini desserts highlighting candied ginger, then create three different types of holiday cookies inspired by family traditions.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: World Class Classics
programme.desc: Every culture has its own holiday traditions, and the four remaining bakers celebrate a couple of favorites by reinventing two Hanukkah classics: rugelach and macaroons. Then, they must create their own unique version of a holiday croquembouche.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Re-Gifting
programme.desc: Re-gifting is the theme of the week, as the four remaining bakers must make a candy apple dessert inspired by a candy apple gift, then figure out how turn the contents of a traditional gift basket into a delicious dessert.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Hoopla
programme.desc: The last three bakers must show off their decorating chops in order to be crowned 'Holiday Baking Champion.'

programme.title: Christmas Chowdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall has her table set for a food-filled holiday. Whether it's a Christmas tree made from a tower of waffles, a turducken turned into a mammoth po' boy or even the entire Feast of the Seven Fishes atop one pizza, 'tis the season for eating!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Masks Saves Christmas
programme.desc: When Romeo decides to ruin Christmas for everyone after discovering he's on the naughty list, the PJ Masks partner with Santa Claus to save Christmas!

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Downhill Derby/ Flight Class Heroes
programme.desc: Kit and Tesh plan to compete in Hughesville's Downhilll Derby, but a young inventor has a villainous plan to win! Kit's class takes a trip to see an automatic, pilot-less plane.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Santa for Bob / Snowman Secret Service
programme.desc: When Bob asks Bingo and Rolly to protect a snowman he’s building, the pugs make it their mission to keep their new snowy friend as cool as possible.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Elves for a Day/ The Dreidel Dilemma
programme.desc: The Pugs and pals head to the North Pole to help Santa's elves meet the Christmas deadline! When Chloe's special special dreidel gets left at home, Keia asks the Pugs for help!

programme.title: Mickey's Adventures in Wonderland: Spookley the Square Pumpkin and the Christmas Kittens
T.O.T.S.: Santa Baby/ Shear Madness
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a magical baby reindeer the joy of Christmas giving! When Pip and Freddy accidentally shave a baby sheep's wool, they have to fix it before she is delivered.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Winter Bow Show
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Carnival Caper/ Songbird Soars Again
programme.desc: The Great Orsino and his traveling carnival arrive in Hughesville to steal Kit's rocket-pack. Kit befriends a former pilot, May Songbird, and helps her find the courage to fly her plane again.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Ninja Moths/ Who's Got the Owl Power?
programme.desc: Gekko learns to let go of his pride to stop a new villainous team! Owlette is tricked by Night Ninja to find ingredients for his new dastardly invention.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Powers / Do The Gekko
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.title: Muppet Babies Playdate: Cloud Watching
programme.desc: Summer and Kaylee lie in the grass and look for shapes in the clouds with the help of Gonzo.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: A Very Muppet Babies Christmas/ Summer's Super Fabulous Holiday Surprise
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the playrooms and everyone loves their Secret Santa gifts except Kermit. When a snowstorm cancels Summer's trip home, Piggy brings her traditions to the playroom.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Finders Keepers/ Monster Next Door
programme.desc: Rizzo discovers emeralds in the sandbox and has to decide whether to keep them or not; the Muppet Babies must rescue Potato after he accidentally ends up with a monster.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Very Pug Christmas/ The Latke Kerfuffle
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help Santa search for Bob's Christmas present when it goes missing from his sleigh. Bingo and Rolly help Bob make latkes for his neighbor's Hanukkah party.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Flying Fiasco/ Gekko's Stay at Home Sneezes
programme.desc: Something smells fishy when Catboy receives a scooter as a gift from an unknown aunt. Gekko’s got the sneezes and his friends want him to rest inside HQ.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Wolfy Kids / Wolf-O-Saurus

programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer, the Great/ Planet Gonzo

programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Art for Art's Sake/ Mancave
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Alvin, convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home, tries to stop it.

programme.title: Movie: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: When aliens abduct all the adults, Jimmy Neutron goes on an intergalactic rescue mission.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Momnipresent
programme.desc: It's SepTIMberfest: a big Hollywood event, hosted by a mysterious gazillionaire Timmy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them and their 'world tour,' himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl
programme.desc: Sandy conducts a science experiment in which she studies Patrick and Spongebob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: What's Eating Patrick/ Sanctuary
programme.desc: To defend Bikini Bottom's honour, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition. When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Spoiler-Itis/ Something's Fishy
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyone's favorite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. Alvin and Simon think Theodore's pet goldfish has died.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: House Pest
programme.desc: When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: Movie: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: When aliens abduct all the adults, Jimmy Neutron goes on an intergalactic rescue mission.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise The Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Secret Powers/ I Will Survive
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. Later, when Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Heroes/ She's Got Style
programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon the Superb/ The Sub
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Cubs and Robbers/ Billy the Bug
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous ‘Cubby the Cop’ balloon on the city. Then, Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Sky Police/ Father's Day Parade
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Mission Critical!
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerial tram and a salivating T-Rex.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not
programme.desc: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy. Timmy wishes dad was mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Portal Jacked! / Warren and Hypno, Sitting in a Tree
programme.desc: Leo must venture to Hidden City to save his brothers; Everyone tries to get something Warren Stone has, but he's not letting it go without a fight, and a side of betrayal.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: The Ivory Tower

programme.title: John Fogerty: My 50 Year Trip
programme.desc: Travel on a musical journey through Fogerty's hit parade with Creedence Clearwater Revival and selections from his iconic songbook.

programme.title: Austin City Limits: Miguel/ Alessia Cara

programme.title: Nova: Ultimate Cruise Ship

programme.title: Nature: Dogs in the Land of Lions

programme.title: SuperNature: Wild Flyers: Defying Gravity

programme.title: Independent Lens: Birth of a Movement

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo talk about people who are so soft they're known as the delicates, meet some birds that are best described as winged weirdos, and hang out with some disgusting couples in their honeymoon phase.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chris 'Drama' Pfaff I

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo go on a safari with Amateur Geographic, question their own reality in Glitch in the Simulation, and experiment with some Discount Science.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob's Parents
programme.desc: Patty and Gene, Rob's parents, come to the set to watch videos of their kids' pranks.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige
programme.desc: Rob welcomes WWE Diva, Paige, to learn what it is like to be 'born badass,' watch some 'everyday divas' throwdown and learn there's no better insult than some 'proper smack.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXI
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel go 'flame dumb,' test out their hand skills in 'snatch masters' and slow-mo man's best friend in 'goooodddd booooyyyy.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Floyd Mayweather
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather visits the Ridiculousness studio where Rob shows him what a Pain Face looks like. They'll also endure some Romantic Injuries and learn How Not To Train.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXIV

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wale

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXVII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: T-Pain

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XCIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jay Rock

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XCII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to meet "Industrial Strength Humans," learn about physical therapy in "Crappy Cryo," and get super amped up with some "Energy Drunks."

programme.desc: Rob hangs with Sterling and Chanel to breakdown some 'Extreme Hugging,' see why people get 'Un-followed' and join in the fun of a little 'Slap Fight.'

programme.desc: Adam and Caveman Rob travel to South Africa to challenge the giant Bark Scorpion, the tiny Uroplectes Scorpion, and the venomous Lion Fish. The toxins of the marine animals prove to be truly the next level of pain.

programme.title: Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Supercuts
programme.desc: Find out which entrepreneur sparked a Jokers fashion debate, when Joe first starting 'nosing' people and which challenge was originally filmed for the pilot episode.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Actually Quite Wholesome
programme.desc: Find out what Yamaneika Saunders does on blind dates, what bizarre get-rich-quick schemes Julian McCullough has up his sleeve, and how Jessimae Peluso brings Yamaneika to tears from laughter.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Comedy Knocked Up
programme.desc: Moshe Kasher does the best victory dance ever, Clayton English and Moshe get real playing patty cake, and Natasha Leggero reveals two men in one from her past.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 7
programme.desc: A tipsy Mayor earning a DUI, some severe Australian road rage, and a snowmobile avalanche you won't believe.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 8
programme.desc: Twenty of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding, and an extreme case of Russian road rage.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 9
programme.desc: You'll see a passed out pilot, road rage rants, a nearly-too-hot-for-TV motorcycle ride, and a mail truck that delivers a hit. Keeping the show on the road is our celebrity cast.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 10
programme.desc: Counting down the 20 most moronic motor heads ever caught on tape. You'll see a car cut in half, a bumper-loving pig, and a snow plow driver who makes vehicles disappear.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 11
programme.desc: The 20 most hysterical motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on water. See an out-of-control mail truck, a wild road rager, and a man treating a motorbike like it's his girlfriend.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Pranksters 3

programme.desc: Maury is a free spirit looking for love and Danny may have just what she needs, as they head out on a flirty, booze-filled safari. Alex hopes to charm Harmony while they attend a sculpting class and attempt to re-enact a classic Patrick Swayze scene.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tats for Love
programme.desc: Country girl Alex is looking for a devout man in Elijah, but he may not love Jesus enough to suit her Southern ways. Special effects makeup artist Taylor and bud-tender Lam commemorate their first date by getting sentimental tattoos together.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Steamy Down Under
programme.desc: London expat Hannah and Joy hit it off and things get steamy, but not exactly where Hannah expected. Hair model and vegan Devin tries to impose his healthy lifestyle on former beauty queen Lauryn.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Extra Cheese, Please
programme.desc: Newly fit Joshua takes Govind for a wild romp in the park while they go zorbing. Personal trainer Nathan pays homage to his favorite 80's movie by taking photographer Haley on the perfect pizza making date.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tats for Love
programme.desc: Country girl Alex is looking for a devout man in Elijah, but he may not love Jesus enough to suit her Southern ways. Special effects makeup artist Taylor and bud-tender Lam commemorate their first date by getting sentimental tattoos together.

programme.desc: Philanthropist Rachel falls over conditioning coach PJ to learn some Hollywood stunts, and the chemistry is on fire.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Stuffing Is the Best Part
programme.desc: The eight remaining bakers begin by making their best holiday whoopie pies that evoke a randomly-assigned theme of turkey, pumpkin, Pilgrims or fall foliage. Then, they must create stuffed holiday cakes that reveal a surprise center when sliced open.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving's Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers get creative with Thanksgiving-inspired desserts, and in the first round, their sweets feature canned cranberry sauce. Then, in the main heat, the bakers must invent a dessert highlighting their assigned harvest ingredient.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Ginger and Spice and Everything Nice
programme.desc: In this week's challenges, the six remaining bakers revel in the warm, taste bud-tingling flavour of ginger. They must make mini desserts highlighting candied ginger, then create three different types of holiday cookies inspired by family traditions.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: World Class Classics
programme.desc: Every culture has its own holiday traditions, and the four remaining bakers celebrate a couple of favorites by reinventing two Hanukkah classics: rugelach and macaroons. Then, they must create their own unique version of a holiday croquembouche.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Re-Gifting
programme.desc: Re-gifting is the theme of the week, as the four remaining bakers must make a candy apple dessert inspired by a candy apple gift, then figure out how turn the contents of a traditional gift basket into a delicious dessert.

programme.desc: The last three bakers must show off their decorating chops in order to be crowned 'Holiday Baking Champion.'

programme.desc: The Bertinelli and Vitale clans are gathered together for a fun and festive celebration to keep the holiday spirit alive! The blended families will feast on crown roast of lamb with mint and green onion pesto, and almond-cranberry rice pilaf.

programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Live Woman of Proven Fertility
programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Repeated Blows to His Unformed Head
programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Corey's Been Dead for An Hour
programme.desc: Charlie becomes annoyed with Alan for constantly sponging off him and promising to cover the tab 'next time.' When Alan tries to leave Charlie the cheque for dinner with two women, Charlie tries to beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Castrating Sheep in Montana
programme.desc: Alan expects the worst when Berta learns that he's been seeing her daughter, Naomi, but Berta's reaction is surprising and much worse than Alan could have imagined.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Castrating Sheep in Montana
programme.desc: Alan expects the worst when Berta learns that he's been seeing her daughter, Naomi, but Berta's reaction is surprising and much worse than Alan could have imagined.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Worry, Speed Racer
programme.desc: When Jake tells Charlie and Alan that he often overhears his mother and Herb having sex, it triggers a repressed memory for Charlie. Rose tries to help Charlie work through the problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That's Summer Sausage, Not Salami
programme.desc: After getting to know Danielle, Charlie discovers that she shares some common interests with Alan and proceeds to set them up, but when things begin to heat up between them, Charlie becomes jealous.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Damn Stalker
programme.desc: When Rose announces she is moving to London, Charlie must face his true feelings for her. Meanwhile, Alan fudges his profile on an Internet dating service, attracting a fellow profile embellisher, Beverly.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Merely Slept With a Commie
programme.desc: When Evelyn expresses sympathy for a friend who had no mourners at her funeral, Alan and Charlie inform her that she's headed for the same fate. Instead of taking their comments as a motive to change, she cunningly makes them regret what they said.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville
programme.desc: When Jake starts covering his walls with posters of sexy women, Alan feels pressure to make the most of what little childhood his son has left. Meanwhile, Kandi embarks on a new career as an actress.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tucked, Taped and Gorgeous
programme.desc: Alan befriends Greg, a gay single dad, causing Alan and Charlie to re-examine their own sexual identities. Meanwhile, Jake has a crush on Greg's daughter, Sophie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Prostitutes and Gelato
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan must confront their 'daddy issues' when Evelyn's new boyfriend invites them to Las Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.desc: Charlie reacts oddly after an evening with his mother, and Alan's date reacts oddly after having sex with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Warning, It's Dirty

programme.desc: When 'meanie moms' Marly and Lindsay guilt Christine into serving hot lunch at Ritchie's school, she finds herself serving with Stan and vows not to sleep with him again. Meanwhile, she and Matthew decide they must take control of their dating lives.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Playdate With Destiny
programme.desc: Christine's crush on Mr. Harris makes her lose her composure around him at Ritchie's school's fundraising gala. When Ritchie wins the raffle prize of a playdate with him, Christine is thrilled, until Richard's father-son plans threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition

programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: Family Man, Family Murderer: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When pregnant Colorado mom, Shanann Watts and her two daughters vanish without a trace, her husband Chris pleads for his family's safe return. But as the investigation digs deeper, dark secrets are revealed and Chris transforms from family man to monster.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Down by the River
programme.desc: In a harrowing call, a terrified woman tries to give police clues: there's a gun, she's near a river, and her kids are at risk. After police find her body in the river, they learn a stomach-churning truth about a killer who's been a predator for years.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Cleveland 911 receives call from a panicked woman saying a mysterious man forced his way into her home and shot her boyfriend in front of their kids. Detectives have to untangle a twisted web of jealousy to find out who killed this young father and why.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: Murder in Michigan
programme.desc: In July 2003, the family of 80-year-old Dorothy Murphy is in a panic when their beloved matriarch disappears while running errands. When her burned car is found abandoned behind a Flint, Michigan nightclub, their fears are realized.

programme.title: Killed by Kindness
programme.desc: A riding injury forces an avid outdoorswoman to rely on a lineup of acquaintances. Signe Edwards finds out the hard way that trusting the wrong person can have deadly consequences.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: Murder in Michigan
programme.desc: In July 2003, the family of 80-year-old Dorothy Murphy is in a panic when their beloved matriarch disappears while running errands. When her burned car is found abandoned behind a Flint, Michigan nightclub, their fears are realized.

programme.title: Killed by Kindness
programme.desc: A riding injury forces an avid outdoorswoman to rely on a lineup of acquaintances. Signe Edwards finds out the hard way that trusting the wrong person can have deadly consequences.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A series of bizarre 911 calls come in to police in two cities from a serial killer confessing his crimes. The man becomes known as the Weepy Voiced Killer, due to his strange, whining voice--and many young women will fall before he can be stopped.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Silencer
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both. Police respond and find the boyfriend executed. Cops must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A househunting trip along the Ohio Turnpike in Spring 2005 for Dr. Gulam Moonda and his wife, Donna, ends in disaster when a gunman approaches on the side of the highway.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Hide and Creep
programme.desc: For a mom of three, a trip to the casino is a chance to escape for some fun. But when her journey is cut short and she fails to return home, her family panics and launches a search for her and her vehicle that ultimately reveals a terrible truth.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Devil's Pact
programme.desc: When a young mother of three plummets into depression, she turns to the internet to find comfort. What she discovers is a virtual world of fetishes and fantasies, where seemingly helpful hands hide the darkest of intentions.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Curse of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: The story of the tomb. The prize that Howard Carter had sought all his life was to yield more than anyone could imagine. Thousands of pieces, crowned by the famous solid-gold coffin and solid-gold death mask.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Temple of the Sands
programme.desc: The story of how Belzoni made some of his greatest discoveries including the tomb of Seti I, the most beautiful in the Valley of the Kings, and the hidden entrance to the mysterious sand-covered temple of Ramesses at Abu Simbel.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Mystery of the Rosetta Stone
programme.desc: The story of the race to decipher Ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marion Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Marion, Virginia, to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. However, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Mine Master's House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Quakertown, Pennsylvania, in order to reclaim items from an old mine master's house. They are surprised to find much of the house picked over before they arrive.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Covington Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work on Covington Church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Scott Boulevard Baptist Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Decatur, GA, to salvage the Scott Boulevard Baptist Church. Key items include arched doorways and large stained glass windows. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay build an iron console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Little Chef Diner
programme.desc: The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. The crew also picks through a huge warehouse in Greensboro, NC. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wheeling Apartment
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the rest of the team salvage elements from an apartment building in Wheeling, WV. Key items include arched doors, a double drain board sink and wooden medallions.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: P.A. Denny Riverboat
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a calliope from a riverboat in Parkersburg, WV. They also split into teams to pick through the owner's large warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nehi Bottling Plant
programme.desc: Mike and the team salvage large industrial doors from the old Nehi Bottling Plant in Covington, VA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former First National Bank
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, NC. Key items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. At the shop, Robert builds a bar out of a boat salvaged from Smith Mountain Lake.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.desc: The TMNT need to learn how to listen and get in touch with nature in order to save Todd after he’s captured by a group of hunters.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Repo Mantis/ Down with the Sickness

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: Plankton uses a clone of SpongeBob in order to steal the secret formula from Mr. Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Pat takes SpongeBob on as his role model; Bob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes

programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: One Man's Junk/ Snow Day
programme.desc: The turtles argue about how to get a piece of the mystic metal from Repo Mantis. Ghostbear decides to mess with the turtles during a snow day.

programme.desc: A trip to R-Fair City nearly turns into a monster mash when Hacker abducts Glowla, a beautiful cyberlady who generates pure energy. Hacker is able to snatch Glowla by reprogramming her trick whale, Snout. As a result, Snout goes on a rampage.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: What's Up With Saturn's Rings?/ Sunspot's Night Out
programme.desc: Celery takes Jet, Sydney, and Sean on a trip to explore Saturn's rings to learn what they're made of.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: A Tale About Tails/ Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The kids visit the Jungle of Wagga-Tag-Tail and meet many animals with very different tails.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: Seal Sitters/ From Ray to Zee

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Birthday Cake Problem/ The Doohickey Problem

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog Special

programme.desc: It's a dream come true for Monica when Pete buys a restaurant and makes her head chef.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Boyfriend
programme.desc: Jerry meets New York Mets player Keith Hernandez, but is hurt when Keith makes a date with Elaine. George tells the unemployment office that he is close to securing a job with Vandelay Industries, whose office is Jerry's apartment.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The World According to Peggy
programme.desc: Molly throws a party for Peggy when she suddenly announces she's retiring.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Of Course He's Dead
programme.desc: Walden and Alan discover that Charlie Harper might be alive or not.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Beverly Goldberg Cookbook
programme.desc: Beverly and Adam team up to do a mother-son cooking show on public access television; and when Barry ruins the one college letter of recommendation he is able to get, Murray must step in to help.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie 'Spaceballs,' and Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big But
programme.desc: Max finds herself wanting to be more than just friends with her pastry school partner, Deke. Meanwhile, Caroline is 'hot for teacher' -- the married Chef Nicholas.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Clip It ... Clip It Good
programme.desc: A late night work session with Blue turns into a trip down memory lane for Jason as he recalls the highlights (and lowlights) from the past nine years with everybody.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Bullying
programme.desc: When Eve is suspended from school for calling a boy a bad name, Mike is surprised name calling would be considered bullying. Meanwhile Ryan finally gets a job, but when he buys a motorcycle, Kristin thinks he won't have extra money to help her and Boyd.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Africa's Big Five
programme.desc: Jack travels to South Africa where it is possible to see some of the most recognizable animals of Africa. At the Shamwari Game Reserve, he encounters Africa's Big Five, including lions, rhinos and elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Swamp Safari
programme.desc: Jack is on a safari through Florida's Everglades, where he encounters alligators and rattlesnakes, and gets a are look of the Native American traditions of the Seminole Tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Spectacular Serengeti
programme.desc: Jack and his grandson are on a Serengeti safari where they see cheetahs and lions on the savannah, wildebeest and zebra starting their migration, and visit a local school.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Drastic Measures
programme.desc: Norm tours the Bay Head NJ revetment project with Thacher Brown. Kevin and Carlos find some setbacks trying to get the Pt. Pleasant house off the ground. Richard helps Risa say goodbye to her Manasquan house before it's torn down.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Love Conquers All
programme.desc: A Kid Conservationist visits with owls at a wildlife sanctuary. A woman is dedicated to helping dogs with special needs. Then, a vet visit and tips for your pet, and a boy and his dog forge a forever bond.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Inland Surf Park

programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.
